audit_items.proof_trace: isAssetOutPriceValid is initialized false (safe default) and only set true when the assetOut is encountered in the allowlisted-assets loop with a non-zero, non-stale price (PriceManager.sol:404-406). After the loop, lines 271-273 unconditionally clear eligibleAssetsIdx to 0 when !isAssetOutPriceValid, and lines 274-279 truncate the array length via assembly mstore. No code path can increment eligibleAssetsIdx after the guard fires, and performUpkeep's own _getAssetPrice(assetOut, true) call provides defense-in-depth.
